title: v6.8 release closure: ship Executable Quality Ledger
description: Close v6.8 as the Executable Quality Ledger release: add release definition, checklist, release notes, refresh active release state, run quality-ledger-audit plus release governance gates, and tag only after runtime-backed verification is green. Stop condition: release closure only; do not expand into automatic QIF verdict computation.
triage_notes: Completed v6.8 release closure: release docs, package version, quality-ledger-audit release-state integration, Council review, focused tests, runtime audits, npm test, and smoke validation are green. Active release state will be refreshed to v6.8.0 after closure.
